global.description: The ad features a vibrant design promoting a game with a clear call-to-action.
global.visual_style: bright and playful with geometric shapes
global.main_message: Join NeonArena for free rewards and discounts.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: NeonArena logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the text 'NeonArena' in bold, vibrant colors, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Top decorative shapes
elements.description: Geometric shapes in the background that add a dynamic feel, located at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Join the arena text
elements.description: A prominent text line stating 'Join the arena' in a clear, engaging font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Free rewards text
elements.description: A supportive text line that reads 'Free rewards for new players', positioned below the main body text.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Small circular icons representing game elements, located at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A bold call-to-action button labeled 'Install now', positioned at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge indicating a '-30%' discount, located near the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Center decorative shapes
elements.description: Additional geometric shapes that enhance the visual appeal, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Center circles
elements.description: Small circular shapes that add to the design, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Additional game icons
elements.description: More small circular icons representing game elements, located at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Additional game icons
elements.description: Another set of small circular icons representing game elements, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline 'NeonArena' in large, bold text, prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: A descriptive text that communicates the offer, centered and clear, below the headline.
elements.text_content: Join the arena Free rewards for new players

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button that encourages users to install the app, located at the bottom.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge indicating a discount of '-30%', positioned at the bottom of the ad.
